searching_start: Checking the 4ound map for {item} for you!
Hunting for a {item} nearby. Hang tight!
Looking for the top-rated {item} around your location...
4ound Brain is active! Searching for {item} near you.
no_results:
😕 I couldn't find any active {item} results near you right now.

Try another keyword, nearby area, or send a location pin 📍

No nearby {item} listings showed up yet.

You can try:
• Another keyword
• A nearby area
• Sending your location 📍

I checked around your area but couldn't find any active {item} right now.

Type help to see search examples or reset to start over. If you provided location by text, being specific with location helps.

Looks like there aren't any active {item} listings close to you yet.

Try broadening your search or sending a nearby location 📍
location_request: 📍 To find *{item}*, please share your location. You can type-in your location as a text.
Where are you currently? Send your location so I can show you *{item}* nearby. You can type-in your location as a text. 🌍
vague_request: I'm ready to search! 🔍 What exactly are you looking for?
Help me out a bit—what specific item or service do you need? 🛠️

start:
Great! Let's get {item} listed so people can find you.

_(Type *reset* at any time to start over)_

I can help you sell that {item}. Let's start the registration!

_(Type *reset* if you need to start fresh)_
ask_item_name: What is the *name* of the item you want to sell? (e.g., iPhone 13, Designer Bag)
To start, what exactly are you selling? 🔍 (e.g., 'Toyota Corolla 2015' or 'Kitchen Blender').
Please tell me the *name or title* of your item. 📝 (Example: 'PS5 Console' or 'Office Desk').
ask_item_info:
Got it! Describe the *{item}* — condition, brand, specs, and any keywords buyers might search for. 📝

_(Example: 'iPhone 12 Pro Max, 256GB, black, excellent condition, original charger included')_

Nice! Tell buyers about this *{item}* in detail. Good descriptions get more views! 🔍

_(Example: 'Fairly used Toyota Camry 2018, leather seats, reverse camera, Lagos')_

Great. Share the full details of your *{item}* — brand, size, condition, anything important! 🛠️

_(Example: 'Almost brand new Tecno Spark 8, 64GB, comes with box and accessories')_
ask_photo: 📸 Great details! Now, please **send a clear photo** of the {item} so buyers can see it.
A picture is worth a thousand words! Please *upload a photo* of the item now.
ask_price: How much are you selling this {item} for? 💰 (e.g., 50k or 50,000)
What's your asking price for this {item}? 💰
offer_quick.ask_phone: Perfect, *{price}* for the *{item}* sounds like a great deal! 🤝 What *Number/WhatsApp number* should buyers use to contact you? 📞
offer_quick.ask_visibility:
How do you want to handle the sale?

1. *Physical Meetup* 📍 (Meet in person)
2. *Delivery Only* 🚚 (Ship to buyer)
offer_quick.ask_location: Final step! 📍 Please share the location where the item is for pickup.
offer_quick.phone_error: ❌ Please provide a valid phone number so buyers can reach you.
offer_quick.success_msg: Listing Successful! Your item is live for 7 days.
offer_quick.location_button_error: 📍 Please use the *'Send Location'* button above!

start: Got it! I'll help you hire for this role. 💼
I'll help you get the word out for this opening! 🚀
Let's find the right people for your opening. 👥
ask_job_details:
Describe the role and requirements. Include job title keywords so job seekers find it! 📄

_(Example: 'Looking for an experienced driver, must have valid license, Abuja based, Monday to Saturday')_

What should applicants know? Include the job title and skills needed! 💼

_(Example: 'Hiring a chef for a restaurant in Lekki Lagos, experience in continental and local cuisine required')_

Tell us about this position in detail. The more specific you are, the better candidates you attract! 🎯

_(Example: 'Need a security guard for a shopping mall in Wuse 2, night shift, must have NSCDC training')_
ask_job_salary: What is the pay for this position? 💰 (e.g., 200k or 150000)
How much are you offering for the job 💰 (e.g., 50k or 400,000)
offer_job.ask_phone: Got it! **{price}** sounds good. 💼 What number/WhatsApp number should applicants use to contact you? 📞
offer_job.ask_name: What is your **Business, Company or Brand Name**?
offer_job.ask_visibility:
Is this job location-specific?

1. *On-site* 📍 (Must be at the location)
2. *Remote/Anywhere* 🌍 (Location doesn't matter)

*Please reply with 1 or 2*
offer_job.ask_location: Where is the job based? 📍 Please share the location.
offer_job.phone_error: ❌ Please provide a valid number so applicants can contact you.
offer_job.success_msg: Job Posted! I'll show this to qualified people nearby.
offer_job.location_button_error: 📍 Please use the *'Send Location'* button above!

start:
Ready to put your {item} service on the map? I just need a few details.

_(Type *reset* at any time to start over)_

Ready to help customers discover your {item} service?

_(Type *reset* at any time to start over)_

Let's get your {item} service listed so locals can find you!

_(Type *reset* if you need to start fresh)_
ask_details: Tell us more about your *{item}* service. Include keywords customers might search for!
Describe your *{item}* service in detail. The more keywords you use, the easier customers find you!
What should customers know about your *{item}* service? Be specific — keywords help people find you!
start_generic: Ready to put your business on the map? I just need a few details.
Let's get your business listed so customers nearby can find you.
Great! Let's set up your business profile.
ask_details_generic:
Describe your service in detail — include what you do and where you operate! 📝

_(Example: 'I am a tailor specializing in native wear and suits, based in Wuse Abuja')_

What service do you offer? Be specific so customers can find you easily! 🔍

_(Example: 'Home cleaning, deep cleaning, office cleaning — Garki and Maitama')_

Tell customers what your business does. Include your skills and location for better visibility! 🚀

_(Example: 'Graphic designer, logo design, flyers, branding — available everywhere')_

Describe your work in a few sentences. Mention your specialty and area! 🛠️

_(Example: 'Mobile phone repairs, screen replacement, battery swap — Kubwa Abuja')_
offer_pro.ask_name: What is your *Name, Business/Company or Brand Name*?
offer_pro.ask_phone: Great! *{price}* sounds like a fair rate. What *Number/WhatsApp number* should customers use to contact you? 📞
offer_pro.ask_visibility:
How should customers find you?

1. *Physical Shop* 📍 (People can visit me)
2. *Delivery Only* 🚚 (Hide my house address)

*Please reply with 1 or 2*
offer_pro.ask_location: Final step! 📍 Please share your office/shop location.
offer_pro.phone_error: ❌ Please provide a valid phone number so customers can reach you.
offer_pro.success_msg: Registration Successful! Your business is live.
offer_pro.location_button_error: 📍 Please use the *'Send Location'* button above!

greeting:
Hello! I'm the 4ound Brain. 🚀

💡 *4ound currently works best in English.*

Try typing things like:
👉 _I need a plumber_
👉 _I want to buy books_
👉 _I want to sell my phone_

(Btw, if you ever get stuck, just type 'reset' to start over! 😊)

Welcome to 4ound! 🔍

💡 *4ound currently works best in English.*

Try:
👉 _Looking for a mechanic_
👉 _I want to sell my shoe_
👉 _I need a tailor_

Pro-tip: Type 'reset' anytime to start a fresh search.

4ound is here! 🗺️ What are you looking for or listing today?

💡 *4ound currently works best in English.*

Examples:
• _I need a doctor_
• _I sell bags_
• _Where can I find a pharmacy?_

(If you make a mistake, just type 'reset' and we go again! ✌️)

searching_start: Mo n wa {item} nitosi rẹ lọwọlọwọ...

location_request: 📍 Lati wa {item}, jọwọ fi ipo rẹ ranṣẹ.
Nibo ni o wa lọwọlọwọ? Fi ipo rẹ ranṣẹ ki n le fi {item} ti o wa nitosi rẹ han ọ. 🌍

start: O da gidi! Ẹ jẹ ki a ṣe akosile {item} rẹ ki awọn eniyan le ri ọ.
Mo le ràn ọ lọ́wọ́ láti ta {item} yẹn. Ẹ jẹ́ kí a bẹ̀rẹ̀!
ask_item_info: O dára! Jọ̀wọ́ sọ púpọ̀ sí i nípa **ìjẹ́gidi àti àpèjúwe** {item} yìí. 📝 (Àpẹẹrẹ: 'Ó ṣì jẹ́ tuntun' tàbí 'Ìtóbi rẹ̀ jẹ́ 42').
Ẹ kú iṣẹ́! Kí ni àwọn nkan tí oníbàárà yẹ kí ó mọ̀ nípa {item} yìí? 🛠️ (Àpẹẹrẹ: 'Mo rà á ní oṣù méjì sẹ́yìn' tàbí 'Kò ní fọ́nrán kankan').
ask_item_name: Kí ni **orúkọ** nkan tí o fẹ́ tà? (Àpẹẹrẹ: iPhone 13, Designer Bag)
Láti bẹ̀rẹ̀, kí ni o n tà gangan? 🔍 (Àpẹẹrẹ: 'Toyota Corolla 2015' tàbí 'Iná raga').
Jọ̀wọ́ sọ **orúkọ** nkan náà fún mi. 📝 (Àpẹẹrẹ: 'PS5 Console' tàbí 'Tábìlì Ọ́fíìsì').
ask_photo: 📸 Ẹ kú iṣẹ́! Jọ̀wọ́ **fi fọ́tò tó ṣe kedere** ránṣẹ́ kí àwọn oníbàárà lè rí {item} náà.
Ẹ jọ̀wọ́ **fi fọ́tò {item} náà ránṣẹ́** sínú WhatsApp yìí báyìí. 🖼️
ask_price: Elò ni ẹ fẹ́ ta {item} yìí? 💰 (Àpẹẹrẹ: 50k tàbí 50,000)
Kí ni iye owó tí ẹ fẹ́ gba lórí {item} yìí? 💰

search.search_header: 🔍 *Ga waɗanda aka samu kusa da kai:*
searching_start: Ina neman {item} kusa da kai yanzu...
Ina duba taswirar 4ound don neman {item} dinka!
Brain 4ound yana aiki! Ina neman {item} kusa da kai.
no_results: Ban sami wani {item} a kusa ba. 😔
Kamar kai ne mutum na farko da kake neman {item} a nan! Ba a sami komai ba.
location_request: 📍 Don samun {item}, turo mana wurin da kake.
Ina kake a yanzu? Turo mana wurin da kake don in nuna maka {item} da ke kusa da kai. 🌍
vague_request: Na shirya bincike! 🔍 Menene kake nema takamaimai?
Taimaka mini—wane takamaiman abu kake bukata? 🛠️

start: Madalla! Bari mu sanya {item} dinka a taswira domin mutane su same ka.
Zan iya taimaka maka ka sayar da {item} dinka. Bari mu fara rajista!
ask_item_info: Madalla! Yanzu kuma, gaya mini yanayin **inganci da bayanan** wannan {item} din. 📝 (Misali: 'Sabo ne a cikin akwati' ko 'An yi amfani da shi kaɗan, girman sa 42').
Yayi kyau! Za ka iya ba mu takaitaccen bayani game da {item} din? 🔍 (Misali: 'Yana da dukkan kayan sa' ko 'Ba shi da kowane datti').
Madalla. Don Allah bayyana mana yanayin wannan {item} din. 🛠️ (Misali: 'Ingancin baturi kashi 85%' ko 'Wata biyu kawai aka yi amfani da shi').
ask_photo: 📸 Madalla! Yanzu kuma, don Allah **turo hoto** mai kyau na {item} din domin masu saya su gani.
Don Allah **saka hoton** abun da kake sayarwa yanzu. Hoto yana sa kaya sayuwa da sauri! 🖼️
ask_price: Nawa ne farashin wannan {item} din? 💰 (Misali: 50k ko 50,000)
Nawa kake son sayar da wannan {item} din? 💰
offer_quick.ask_phone: Madalla! Wace lamba ce ta **WhatsApp** ya kamata masu saya su yi amfani da ita? 📞

greeting:
Sannu! Barka da zuwa 4ound. Ta yaya zan iya taimaka maka a yau?

(Idan ka sami matsala, taba 'reset' don farawa! 😊)
Maraba da 4ound! Me kake son samu a yau?
fallback:
Ban gama fahimtar wannan ba. 🧐

Gwada faɗar wani abu kamar:
👉 'Ina son makanike'
👉 'Ina son sayar da biredi'

Don Allah, gwada fadar wani abu kamar:
👉 'Ina kantin magani mafi kusa?'
👉 'Ni mai gyaran wutar lantarki ne a Kubwa'

search.search_header: 🔍 *Ihe ndị a dị nso na gị:*
searching_start: A na m achọ {item} nso gị ugbu a...

Brain 4ound adịla njikere! A na m achọ {item} nso gị.
no_results: Ahụghị m {item} ọ bụla nso ebe a. 😔

Ebee ka ị nọ ugbu a? Ziga ebe ị nọ ka m gosi gị {item} ndị dị nso na gị. 🌍

Biko nyere m aka—kedu ihe ma ọ bụ ọrụ ị chọrọ kpọmkwem? 🛠️

start: Ọ gba m m m! Ka anyị debanye aha {item} gị ka ndị mmadụ hụ gị.
Enwere m ike inyere gị aka ire {item} ahụ. Ka anyị malite!
ask_item_info: Ọ dị mma! Ugbu a, kọwaa otú **ọnọdụ na nkọwa** {item} a dị. 📝 (Dịka: 'Ọ ka dị ọhụrụ' ma ọ bụ 'Size 42, ọ nweghị ebe ọ rụrụ arụ').
Imeela! Biko nye nkenke nkọwa gbasara {item} a. 🛠️ (Dịka: 'E jiri ya rụọ ọrụ naanị ọnwa abụọ' ma ọ bụ 'Chaja ya so ya').
Ọ gba m m m. Biko gwa m ntakịrị gbasara {item} gị. 🔍 (Dịka: 'Battery health ya bụ 85%').
ask_item_name: Gịnị bụ **aha** ihe ị chọrọ ire? (Dịka: iPhone 13, Akpa Designer)
Ka anyị malite, gịnị kpọmkwem ka ị na-ere? 🔍 (Dịka: 'Toyota Corolla 2015' ma ọ bụ 'Blender kichin').
Biko gwa m **aha** ihe ị na-ere. 📝 (Dịka: 'PS5 Console' ma ọ bụ 'Tebụl Ọfịs').
ask_photo: 📸 Imeela! Ugbu a, biko **ziga foto** doro anya nke {item} ahụ ka ndị na-azụ ihe hụ ya.
Biko **tinye foto** ihe ị na-ere ugbu a. Foto na-enyere ihe ire ọsọ ọsọ! 🖼️
